name: daily-brief
description: Live daily working surface as a Cowork artifact. /brief pulls today's calendar, inbox, CRM tasks, outreach queue, and yesterday's reflection into a single artifact titled "Today's Brief" with textarea annotations per item. /process-brief reads back the annotations and routes them — drafts replies in Gmail, moves CRM tasks, adds meeting talking points. /setup-brief captures section preferences. Configurable per user via /setup-brief.
